film.title: Om Jai Jagadish
film.overview: Widowed Mrs. Saraswati Batra (Waheeda Rehman) has brought up three sons with a lot of care and love. Her eldest son Om (Anil Kapoor) is very honest and diligent; her two other sons Jai (Fardeen Khan), and Jagdish (Abhishek Bachchan) also live in the same house. this is their story

Here? What's lacking here? - We needn't suffer like this Problem is, you‘ve lived comfort big. You got no idea how difficult life is
